privacy: Artwork, projects and preferences stay on the device unless the person using AIR-DROW explicitly exports, shares or starts an optional AI creation.
releaseGate: npm run vercel:build validates source integrity, local hand assets, bilingual markup, runtime coverage, export/gesture tests, cache/version contracts, theme tokens, documentation and generated production output.
support: Use Settings > About App to review app readiness, hand drawing readiness, language, release information and developer profile.
name: AIR-DROW Final Release Readiness & Cache Integrity Edition
summary: v8.0.0 synchronizes the cache revision and release metadata across the page, PWA manifest, worker, source modules and deployment output; it also locks the final physical-device validation contract into the project.
releaseName: AIR-DROW Final Release Readiness & Cache Integrity Edition
